page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genome-based Fingerprint Scanning (GFS) takes as input an experimentally obtained peptide mass fingerprint, scans a genome sequence of interest, and outputs the most likely regions of the genome from which the mass fingerprint is derived.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Genome-based Fingerprint Scanning (GFS) takes as input an experimentally obtained peptide mass fingerprint, scans a genome sequence of interest, and outputs the most likely regions of the genome from which the mass fingerprint is derived.
